allow: Bash(docker buildx use kai-builder docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -f kailab/Dockerfile -t us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/preplanai/preplan/kailab:ci-trigger --push .)

Bash(git -C /Users/jacobschatz/projects/kai commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add GitHub Actions compatibility for CI system

Implement full expression engine \(${ }\) with recursive descent parser
supporting functions, operators, and context lookups. Add pull_request
trigger type, step if: conditionals, step output capture via
GITHUB_OUTPUT, and expression interpolation throughout runner.

Add runs-on label matching in job claim SQL, service containers as K8s
pod sidecars, concurrency controls with group locking and
cancel-in-progress, and permissions parsing.

Implement CIStore interface \(local filesystem + GCS\) powering
actions/cache with key/restore-keys and actions/upload-artifact +
download-artifact for cross-job artifact passing.

Add generic action execution framework: clone action repos, parse
action.yml, run composite actions inline, execute Node.js actions,
and warn on unsupported Docker actions. Expand built-in actions with
rust-toolchain, setup-python, setup-java, and real checkout via git
clone.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/jacobschatz/projects/kai commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add writable /tmp volume to runner deployment

The CI store needs a writable directory for caches and artifacts.
The runner pod has readOnlyRootFilesystem, so mount an emptyDir
at /tmp.
EOF
\)")
